title: Mubert is an AI music production app that generates batches of instrumentals in all genres based on a text description
author: AIInformer

comments.author: AIInformer
comments.body:
Mubert AI employs a combination of AI and machine learning algorithms to generate music in real-time. The platform has an extensive database of pre-recorded audio samples, categorized by genre, mood, and other parameters. These samples are then combined and remixed by AI algorithms to create an infinite stream of music that adapts to the listener's preferences.  
https://mubert.com/render/pricing?via=beatgenerator
